lines.english: Did the boy go where he wanted to?
lines.chinese: 那个男孩去他想去的地方了吗？
lines.raw: Did the boy go where he wanted to? | 那个男孩去他想去的地方了吗？

lines.english: Children who play truant from school are unimaginative.
lines.chinese: 逃学的孩子都缺乏想象力。
lines.raw: Children who play truant from school are unimaginative. | 逃学的孩子都缺乏想象力。
A quiet days' fishing, | 安静地钓上一天鱼，

lines.english: or eight hours in a cinema seeing the same film over and over again, is usually as far as they get.
lines.chinese: 或者在电影院里看8小时的同一部电影，这通常是他们能做到的最大限度了。
lines.raw: or eight hours in a cinema seeing the same film over and over again, is usually as far as they get. | 或者在电影院里看8小时的同一部电影，这通常是他们能做到的最大限度了。

lines.english: They have all been put to shame by a boy who, while playing truant travelled 1, 600 miles.
lines.chinese: 然而，一个逃学竟走了1600英里的孩子使他们都相形见绌了。
lines.raw: They have all been put to shame by a boy who, while playing truant travelled 1, 600 miles. | 然而，一个逃学竟走了1600英里的孩子使他们都相形见绌了。

lines.english: He hitchhiked to Dover and towards evening went into a boat to find somewhere to sleep.
lines.chinese: 他搭便车到了多佛，傍晚时分进了一条船想找个地方睡觉。
lines.raw: He hitchhiked to Dover and towards evening went into a boat to find somewhere to sleep. | 他搭便车到了多佛，傍晚时分进了一条船想找个地方睡觉。

lines.english: When he woke up next morning, he discovered that the boat had, in the meantime, travelled to Calais.
lines.chinese: 第二天早晨醒来时，他发现那条船已行驶到加来。
lines.raw: When he woke up next morning, he discovered that the boat had, in the meantime, travelled to Calais. | 第二天早晨醒来时，他发现那条船已行驶到加来。

lines.english: No one noticed the boy as he crept off.
lines.chinese: 他悄悄溜下船时没人注意到他。
lines.raw: No one noticed the boy as he crept off. | 他悄悄溜下船时没人注意到他。

lines.english: From there, he hitchhiked to Paris in a lorry.
lines.chinese: 从那里，他又搭上一辆卡车去了巴黎。
lines.raw: From there, he hitchhiked to Paris in a lorry. | 从那里，他又搭上一辆卡车去了巴黎。

lines.english: The driver gave him a few biscuits and a cup of coffee and left him just outside the city.
lines.chinese: 司机给了他几块饼干和一杯咖啡，在城外把他放下了。
lines.raw: The driver gave him a few biscuits and a cup of coffee and left him just outside the city. | 司机给了他几块饼干和一杯咖啡，在城外把他放下了。

lines.english: The next car the boy stopped did not take him into the centre of Paris as he hoped it would,
lines.chinese: 男孩拦的下一辆车并没有像他希望的那样把他带到巴黎市中心，
lines.raw: The next car the boy stopped did not take him into the centre of Paris as he hoped it would, | 男孩拦的下一辆车并没有像他希望的那样把他带到巴黎市中心，

lines.english: but to Perpignan on the French-Spanish border.
lines.chinese: 而是带到了法国和西班牙边境上的佩皮尼昂。
lines.raw: but to Perpignan on the French-Spanish border. | 而是带到了法国和西班牙边境上的佩皮尼昂。

lines.english: There he was picked up by a policeman and sent back to England by the local authorities.
lines.chinese: 在那里他被一个警察发现，然后当地政府把他遣送回了英国。
lines.raw: There he was picked up by a policeman and sent back to England by the local authorities. | 在那里他被一个警察发现，然后当地政府把他遣送回了英国。

lines.english: He has surely set up a record for the thousands of children who dream of evading school.
lines.chinese: 他无疑为成千上万梦想逃学的孩子们创造了一项纪录。
lines.raw: He has surely set up a record for the thousands of children who dream of evading school. | 他无疑为成千上万梦想逃学的孩子们创造了一项纪录。
